upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tamAhftamagniBiH saNGrApayanti' (Sa॰brA॰12.5.1.13) ganDaM grAhayantItyarTaH SamSabdo'tra viSezako na
'bfhaspaterBAgamavajiGrata' (vA0 saM0 99 19) AGrARaM kurutetyarTaH adUre vA'vaSabdaH adUrAjjiGratetyAha
'striyE mUrDAnamevAvajiGrati' (pA0 gf0 118) muKena spfSati cumbati vA
'samaSo vA prativiBajyAvaGreRa BakzayitvA' (Apa0 SrO0 84163) avaGro'vaGrARam ukto'rTaH
'avaGreyameva tanneva prASitaM nevAprASitam' (tE0 brA0 13107) avaGreyaM GreyaM GrAtavyam nAvaSabdo viSezamarTekaroti
'AGrAya cumbitvA nAsikayA spfzwvA vA.. AjaGrurmUrDni bAlAMSca' (Bawwi0 1412) ukto'rTaH

'tasmAdasAvimAM vfzwyAByunattyaBijiGrati' (E0 brA0 17) aBijiGrati cumbati aBiGrARamupaBogaH BUgataM havirdyorupaBuNkta ityarTa iti zaqguruSizyaH aBiGrARaM BOmarasAdAnamiti BawwaBAskarAdayaH loke prAyeRopANpUrvasya jiGrateH prayogaH
'upAGrAti ca yo ganDAn rasAMSca pfTagviDAn' (BA0 vana0 14504) upAGrAti jiGrati nArTa upANByAm
'SavaganDamupAGrAti suraBiM prApya yo naraH' (BA0 SAM0 11716) ukto'rTaH
